description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian with a highly stylized and distorted body, featuring extremely elongated arms that extend upward and outward in a V-shape. The figure has a realistic human head with short hair and a neutral facial expression. The torso is clad in a fitted top with a visible logo, and the lower body is dressed in tight pants, with the legs bent as if in a squatting or crouched position. The feet are shod in athletic footwear, and the overall proportions are exaggerated, especially in the arms, which are disproportionately long compared to the rest of the body. The surface texture appears smooth and matte, with clear definition in the clothing and facial features.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian with extremely elongated, upward-stretching arms, a realistic head, and a crouched lower body in athletic attire.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest logo, and the dramatic upward V-shape of the elongated arms.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back, bent legs, and the continuation of the elongated arms.
description_view_2: Direct rear view emphasizing the back of the head, shoulders, and the symmetrical spread of the arms.
description_view_3: Side-rear view focusing on the side of the torso, bent legs, and the arm's extension.
